Motion For Relief Of Court Ordered Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Uyen Thuc Vong's Motion for relief of court ordered sanctions issued in the amount of $200.00 to Dennis Carr, Esq., for failure to appear on 11/14/2006 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection, tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings not reported. (212)
